D

DBHelper - package DBHelper
 
DBHelper - Class in DBHelper
This is a super class that contains logic to establish connection to sqlite database and perform queries with helper methods in the RaceCars class.
DBHelper() - Constructor for class DBHelper.DBHelper
This constructor initializes DBHelper with no connections.
delete(String, String) - Method in class DBHelper.RaceCars
This method performs a SQL delete query.
